findings.summary: The error redaction logic uses string `replace()` which only replaces the first occurrence of the API key, potentially leaking credentials if the key appears multiple times in the error message.
findings.suggested_fix: Use `diagnostic.split(apiKey).join("[REDACTED]")` or `.replaceAll(apiKey, "[REDACTED]")` to ensure all occurrences of the API key are redacted.

findings.summary: The error redaction conditionally appends `" [REDACTED]"` to the diagnostic message whenever an API key is configured, creating confusing log messages.
